# AAISM Exam Preparation Workspace

This workspace is designed for preparing for the ISACA AI Security Manager (AAISM) certification exam.

## Study Materials

### Primary Resources
- **ISACA AAISM Official Review Manual** - Read twice
- **ISACA AAISM QAE Database** - Complete three times
- **ISACA AAISM Online Review Course** - Structured roadmap through all exam domains

### Additional Resources
- **Machine Learning Specialization** (DeepLearning.AI) - Practical ML understanding
- **OWASP Top 10 for LLMs** - AI security risks
- **Pravetz16 YouTube Channel** - Manual breakdown and explanations

## Workspace Structure
- `/notes/` - Study notes organized by exam domain
- `/progress/` - Progress tracking for all materials
- `/resources/` - Links and references to study materials
- `/schedule/` - Study planning and scheduling

## Usage
- Update progress trackers as you complete sections
- Take notes in the appropriate domain folders
- Review the dashboard regularly to monitor overall progress
